name: com.shadowlib.core
description: Deterministic RNG, spatial primitives (Grid2D, FieldGrid, Polyomino), and procedural generation building blocks (BinPacker, weighted tables, simplex noise) for games. Pure C#, no Unity engine references in Runtime — usable in non-Unity .NET projects too.

samples.description: Seeding the orchestrator, rolling a tiered loot table, and packing items into a Grid2D.
